Localization.Description: A scheduled task was managed using the command line or PowerShell

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {object.account.name} changed a scheduled task using the command line on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.name} created a scheduled task using the command line on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.name} stopped a scheduled task using the command line on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.name} deleted a scheduled task using the command line on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.name} started a scheduled task using the command line on host {event_src.host}
A scheduled task was managed via PowerShell on host {event_src.host}
